text_block_list.text:
With a fantastic performance in the Twinkle
Series, Narita Taishin has had an impressive first
three years.

The way she triumphs over the best despite her
small stature inspires all those who watch her.
And now, she's become quite the celebrity.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: Narita Taishin! Can I get a word, please?

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text: I'd like to speak with you too, if possible!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Oh, uh...

text_block_list.name: Taishin Fan
text_block_list.text: Taishin! Can I have your signature?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...I guess.

text_block_list.name: Taishin Fan
text_block_list.text:
Oh my gosh, yay! I'll treasure it for the rest of my
life!

text_block_list.name: Gamer A
text_block_list.text: Hey, isn't that Taishin playing over there?

text_block_list.name: Gamer B
text_block_list.text: What?! Do you think she'd battle us if we ask?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Sigh... This is so exhausting.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Everyone and their mom is asking for interviews,
and I can't even walk down the street without
being recognized.
choice_data_list: They're all head over heels for you.
They're all head over heels for you.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yeah, well...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I hate all this fuss over me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I just want some peace and quiet.
choice_data_list: Should I leave you alone, then?
Should I leave you alone, then?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yea—

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hang on—no, you're fine.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: You're... You're all right.

We spend some time together and quietly
reminisce about the adventures we've shared.

We talk about the day we met and how I was
completely blown away by her final sprint.

And there was the Satsuki Sho, where the "top
three"—the BNW trio—faced off in a race that
would become Narita Taishin's turning point.

There was also the way she seized victory in the
Arima Kinen through sheer tenacity.

All in all, we don't exchange many words, but the
conversation flows smoothly. It's completely dark
before we know it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Whoa, it's night already.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Creek always makes a huge deal and gets on my
case when I get back late, so I'd better go.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
choice_data_list: What's up? I thought you were leaving.
What's up? I thought you were leaving.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I used to run so people would acknowledge me.
It's the same reason I entered races.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
The only thing I was interested in was running,
winning, and being validated for doing so well.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: But...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: But now, I really like it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Running, racing... I like it all.
Narita Taishin smiles after saying this.

It's a pure, lighthearted smile, straight from her
heart.
